creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Substantial number of releases/bugfixes, consider MFH. Among other changelog entries...

  - PostfixAdmin requires PHP 7.0 or greater.
  - MySQL 8 compatibility
  - update bundled smarty library (lib/smarty to 3.1.32; includes security fixes)
  - add token to login.php to prevent CSRF
  - Security improvements (setup.php)
  - Users moving to v3.3.0 will find their existing setup_password will no longer work, and will need regenerating (may require UPDATING notes or pkg-message)
